$comment: Shape consumed by seed-from-json.ts. authId values link authors to the content they create/write. Genres must be from the enum: fantasy, scienceFiction, romance, thriller, horror, mystery, adventure, historical, literary, other. Story status: draft, published, completed, abandoned. Omit any optional field to take its default. coverImage/illustration are paths under public/ (e.g. /images/foo.jpeg) or full URLs.

authors.bio: Sci-fi novelist obsessed with generation ships and the people who never see the destination.

universes.name: Exodus 2120
universes.concept: The world is ending. Some of humanity escapes on generational starships bound for new planetary systems. These are the stories of those who did — and those left behind.

characters.name: Captain Sena Okoro
characters.description: Third-generation commander of the Arka, born in flight, sworn to a destination she will never see.

stories.title: The Last Sunrise
stories.synopsis: A family's final hours on Earth before the fleet departs.

rootPage.content: The evacuation klaxon had been sounding for three days, and Amara had stopped hearing it. She stood at the kitchen window with a cup of tea gone cold, watching the last light her family would ever see break over the dead orchard …

children.content: She decided to wake the children. If these were the final hours, they would spend them together, at the table, the way every ordinary morning had begun …
She let them sleep. Some mercies are small. She would carry the last sunrise alone, so that they could carry one more dream …
